mvw.mvw_command: cargo build --release && for i in $(seq 1 200); do ./target/release/bat --paging=never --color=never mvw_input.txt >/dev/null; done
mvw.run_command: for i in $(seq 1 200); do ./target/release/bat --paging=never --color=never mvw_input.txt >/dev/null; done
mvw.input_scale: single local text file (3 lines), repeated 200 invocations
mvw.success_criteria: both commands exit code 0 and target/release/bat exists

environment.methodology: tutorial.md one-pass profiling; process-tree RSS peak (monitor_tree.sh), whole tree not single process; MVW actually run; multi-thread/multi-process peak included.

static_triage.notes: Rust CLI tool; no GPU requirement; build is CPU/RAM heavy due to Rust dependency compilation.

peaks_observed.cpu_utilization_summary: build high (cargo parallel compile), run low-moderate (single CLI invocation)

min_hardware.summary: 2 vCPU / 4 GB RAM / 1 GB disk, no GPU. Raw process-tree peaks: build 3.8125 GB, run 0.0072 GB, disk 0.4182 GB.
